title: Initialize Electron project with electron-vite
body:
Scaffold the project using `pnpm create @quick-start/electron`.
- Framework: React + TypeScript
- Project name: note-mark
- No extra plugins or mirror proxy
- Run `pnpm install` after generation

title: Configure Prettier and ESLint
body:
- Add Prettier config to `.vscode/settings.json` for format-on-save
- Leave `.prettierrc` as generated by electron-vite
- Extend ESLint rules to disable noisy rules and improve DX

title: Configure main process — security and window settings
body:
In `src/main/index.ts`:
- Enable `contextIsolation: true` in webPreferences
- Enable `sandbox: true` in webPreferences
- Set window: `center: true`, `title: 'NoteShark'`, `frame: false`
- Set `vibrancy: 'under-window'`, `visualEffectState: 'active'`
- Set `titleBarStyle: 'hidden'`, `trafficLightPosition: { x: 15, y: 10 }`

title: Configure preload script with context bridge
body:
In `src/preload/index.ts`:
- Assert `contextIsolation` is enabled, throw if not
- Expose empty `context` object via `contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld`
- Update `src/preload/index.d.ts` global type to match exposed `context` shape

title: Set up TypeScript path aliases
body:
- In `tsconfig.web.json`: add `@shared/*`, `@/*` (renderer) path aliases; include `src/shared/**/*`
- In `tsconfig.node.json`: add `@shared/*`, `@main/*` path aliases; include `src/shared/**/*`
- Add matching `resolve.alias` entries in `electron.vite.config.ts` for main, preload, and renderer

title: Scaffold project folder structure
body:
Create the following directories:
- `src/renderer/src/components/` + `index.ts` barrel
- `src/renderer/src/hooks/`
- `src/renderer/src/store/`
- `src/renderer/src/utils/`
- `src/main/lib/`
- `src/shared/`

title: Set up Tailwind CSS
body:
- Install: `pnpm add -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer`
- Run `npx tailwindcss init -p`
- Set `content` in `tailwind.config.js` to `src/renderer/src/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}`
- In `src/renderer/src/index.css`: add Tailwind directives, base layer styles (h-full on #root, select-none, transparent bg, font-mono, antialiased, text-white, overflow-hidden)
- Add custom scrollbar CSS (`-webkit-scrollbar`, `thumb`, `track`)

title: Add utility dependencies and cn helper
body:
- Install: `pnpm add tailwind-merge clsx react-icons`
- In `src/renderer/src/utils/index.ts`: export `cn(...inputs: ClassValue[])` using `twMerge(clsx(inputs))`

title: Build layout components — RootLayout, Sidebar, Content
body:
In `src/renderer/src/components/`:
- `RootLayout`: `<main>` with `flex flex-row h-screen`
- `Sidebar`: `<aside>` with fixed width 250px, `mt-10`, `h-[calc(100vh+10px)]`, `overflow-auto`
- `Content`: `<div>` with `flex-1 overflow-auto`, forwarded ref for scroll reset

Export all from `components/index.ts`.

title: Build DraggableTopBar component
body:
- `src/renderer/src/components/DraggableTopBar.tsx`: absolutely positioned `<header>`, `h-8`, transparent bg
- In `index.css`: add `-webkit-app-region: drag` on `header`, `-webkit-app-region: no-drag` on `header button`
- Mount above `<RootLayout>` in `App.tsx` inside a fragment

title: Build ActionButton, NewNoteButton, DeleteNoteButton
body:
- `ActionButton`: generic `<button>` with default Tailwind styles (border, zinc-400/50, hover:bg-zinc-600/50, transition)
- `NewNoteButton`: wraps `ActionButton`, uses `LuFileSignature` icon from react-icons
- `DeleteNoteButton`: wraps `ActionButton`, uses `FaRegTrashCan` icon from react-icons
- Export `ActionButtonProps` type from `ActionButton` and reuse in children

title: Build ActionButtonsRow component
body:
- `src/renderer/src/components/ActionButtonsRow.tsx`
- Renders `<NewNoteButton>` and `<DeleteNoteButton>` in a flex row with `justify-between mt-1`
- Accepts and spreads all `HTMLDivElement` props

title: Define shared models and types
body:
In `src/shared/models.ts`:
- `NoteInfo`: `{ title: string; lastEditTime: number }`
- `NoteContent`: `string` (type alias)

In `src/shared/constants.ts`:
- `appDirectoryName: 'NoteShark'`
- `fileEncoding: 'utf8'` (typed as `BufferEncoding`)
- `autoSavingTime: 3000`

In `src/shared/types.ts`:
- `GetNotes`, `ReadNote`, `WriteNote`, `CreateNote`, `DeleteNote` function types

title: Build NotePreview and NotePreviewList components
body:
- `NotePreview`: `<div>` with conditional active styling (zinc-400/75), `isActive` prop, renders title as `<h3>` truncated and formatted `lastEditTime` as `<span>`
- `NotePreviewList`: `<ul>` mapping notes to `<NotePreview>`, shows "No notes yet" when empty
- Add `formatDateFromMs` utility using `Intl.DateTimeFormat` with locale from `window.context.locale`
- Expose `locale` via preload context bridge from `navigator.language`

title: Build MarkdownEditor component
body:
- Install: `pnpm add @mdxeditor/editor` and `pnpm add -D @tailwindcss/typography`
- Add typography plugin to `tailwind.config.js`
- Use `<MDXEditor>` with plugins: `headingsPlugin`, `listsPlugin`, `quotePlugin`, `markdownShortcutPlugin`
- Apply `contentEditableClassName` with `outline-none min-h-screen max-w-none text-lg px-8 py-5 caret-yellow-500`
- Apply `prose prose-invert` className

title: Build FloatingNoteTitle component
body:
- `src/renderer/src/components/FloatingNoteTitle.tsx`
- Absolutely positioned centered title bar showing the selected note's title
- Reads from `selectedNoteAtom` via `useAtomValue`
- Returns null if no note selected

title: Set up Jotai state atoms
body:
Install `jotai` via `pnpm add jotai`. In `src/renderer/src/store/index.ts`:
- `notesAtom`: `atom<NoteInfo[]>` initialized from mock
- `selectedNoteIndexAtom`: `atom<number | null>(null)`
- `selectedNoteAtomAsync`: `atom(async (get) => ...)` — reads note content via `window.context.readNote`
- `selectedNoteAtom`: `unwrap(selectedNoteAtomAsync, prev => prev ?? emptyNote)`
- `createEmptyNoteAtom`: writable atom that calls `window.context.createNote`
- `deleteNoteAtom`: writable atom that calls `window.context.deleteNote`
- `saveNoteAtom`: writable atom that calls `window.context.writeNote` and updates `lastEditTime`

title: Implement useNotesList hook
body:
`src/renderer/src/hooks/useNotesList.tsx`:
- Reads `notesAtom` via `useAtomValue`
- Reads/sets `selectedNoteIndexAtom` via `useAtom`
- Exposes `handleNoteSelect(index, onSelect?)` which updates index then calls optional `onSelect`
- Returns `{ notes, selectedNoteIndex, handleNoteSelect }`

title: Implement useMarkdownEditor hook
body:
`src/renderer/src/hooks/useMarkdownEditor.tsx`:
- Reads `selectedNoteAtom`
- Holds `editorRef: MutableRefObject<MDXEditorMethods | null>`
- `handleAutoSaving(content)`: throttled (3000ms, `{ leading: false, trailing: true }`) call to `saveNoteAtom`
- `handleBlur()`: cancels pending throttle, reads `editorRef.current?.getMarkdown()`, calls `saveNoteAtom`
- Returns `{ selectedNote, editorRef, handleAutoSaving, handleBlur }`

title: Wire up scroll reset on note change
body:
In `App.tsx`:
- Add `contentContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)`
- Attach ref to `<Content>`
- Define `resetScroll()` that sets `scrollTop = 0`
- Pass `resetScroll` as `onSelect` prop to `<NotePreviewList>`
- In `NotePreviewList`: extract `onSelect` from props, pass to `handleNoteSelect`

title: File system — getNotesDir and getNotes
body:
In `src/main/lib/index.ts`:
- Install: `pnpm add fs-extra lodash` and `pnpm add -D @types/fs-extra @types/lodash`
- `getRootDir()`: returns `path.join(homedir(), appDirectoryName)`
- `getNotes()`: ensures dir exists, reads dir, filters `.md` files, maps to `NoteInfo` via `getStatsByStat`, sorts by `lastEditTime` desc
- `getNotesInfoFromFilename(filename)`: reads `stat`, returns `{ title, lastEditTime: stat.mtimeMs }`

title: File system — readNote
body:
In `src/main/lib/index.ts`:
- `readNote(title)`: reads file at `getRootDir()/${title}.md` with utf8 encoding, returns content string

title: File system — writeNote
body:
In `src/main/lib/index.ts`:
- `writeNote(title, content)`: writes content to `getRootDir()/${title}.md` with utf8 encoding
- Console.log the filename on write

title: File system — createNote with native dialog
body:
In `src/main/lib/index.ts`:
- `createNote()`: shows `dialog.showSaveDialog` with title "New Note", defaultPath to root dir, filters to `.md` only, `showsTagField: false`, `buttonLabel: 'Create'`, `properties: ['showOverwriteConfirmation']`
- If cancelled or no filePath → return false
- If parent dir !== root dir → show error `dialog.showMessageBox` and return false
- Otherwise `writeFile` with empty content, return filename (without extension)

title: File system — deleteNote with native dialog
body:
In `src/main/lib/index.ts`:
- `deleteNote(title)`: shows `dialog.showMessageBox` with type `warning`, buttons `['Delete', 'Cancel']`, defaultId `1`, cancelId `1`
- If response === 1 → log cancelled, return false
- Otherwise `fs.remove(getRootDir()/${title}.md)`, return true

title: IPC bridge — main process handlers
body:
In `src/main/index.ts`, register handlers inside `app.whenReady`:
- `ipcMain.handle('getNotes', (_, ...args) => getNotes(...args))`
- `ipcMain.handle('readNote', (_, ...args) => readNote(...args))`
- `ipcMain.handle('writeNote', (_, ...args) => writeNote(...args))`
- `ipcMain.handle('createNote', (_, ...args) => createNote(...args))`
- `ipcMain.handle('deleteNote', (_, ...args) => deleteNote(...args))`

title: IPC bridge — preload context exposure
body:
In `src/preload/index.ts`, expose via `contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('context', {...})`:
- `locale: navigator.language`
- `getNotes(...args)` → `ipcRenderer.invoke('getNotes', ...args)`
- `readNote(...args)` → `ipcRenderer.invoke('readNote', ...args)`
- `writeNote(...args)` → `ipcRenderer.invoke('writeNote', ...args)`
- `createNote(...args)` → `ipcRenderer.invoke('createNote', ...args)`
- `deleteNote(...args)` → `ipcRenderer.invoke('deleteNote', ...args)`

Update `src/preload/index.d.ts` global `Window.context` interface to match all exposed functions with correct types from `src/shared/types.ts`.

title: Replace mock data with file system in store
body:
In `src/renderer/src/store/index.ts`:
- Define `loadNotes()` async function: calls `window.context.getNotes()`, sorts by `lastEditTime` desc
- Define `notesAtomAsync = atom<NoteInfo[] | Promise<NoteInfo[]>>(loadNotes())`
- Replace `notesAtom` initial value with `unwrap(notesAtomAsync, prev => prev ?? undefined)`
- Guard all atom readers against `notes === undefined`
- Guard `NotePreviewList` for undefined notes (return null)

title: Welcome note on first launch
body:
In `src/main/lib/index.ts`, inside `getNotes()`:
- After filtering, if `notes` is empty:
  - Read `welcome.md` from `resources/` folder (import as asset string via `?asset`)
  - Write it to `getRootDir()/welcome.md`
  - Push `'welcome.md'` to notes array so it gets mapped to `NoteInfo`
- Define `welcomeNoteFileName = 'welcome.md'` constant to avoid duplication

Create `resources/welcome.md` with onboarding content explaining app features.

title: Production build configuration
body:
- Verify `electron-builder.yaml` config: appId, productName, file includes, resources dir
- Run `pnpm build` → confirm type-check passes and bundles output to `out/`
- Run `pnpm build:mac` (or win/linux) → confirm installer generated in `dist/`
- Test `pnpm start` (production preview) runs correctly
